context: @   Aorta (cause of death in 55%) Histo:   degeneration of elastic tissue in aortic media + cystic medial necrosis of smooth muscle cells Histo:   cystic medial necrosis √  "tulip bulb aorta" = symmetrical dilatation of aortic sinuses of Valsalva slightly extending into ascending aorta (58%) √  triangular coaptation defect of valve cusps (during middiastolic closure at 70% of R-R interval of gated CT) = radiographic sign of aortic insufficiency √  tethered valve cusps at midsystolic opening (= at 10% of R-R interval of a gated CT) ← dilatation of the sinus of Valsalva Cx:   aortic regurgitatio
